articles.title: Sikkim lifts odd-even curbs on private vehicles across state, retains restrictions in Gangtok
articles.description: Gangtok, May 31 (PTI) The Sikkim government on Sunday withdrew the odd-even restriction on the movement of private vehicles across the state, except within Gangtok town, according to an official notification. The decision was taken after the Food and Civil Supplies Department informed a review meeting that sufficient buffer stocks of petrol and diesel had […]

articles.title: After petrol and diesel, will LPG and PNG prices go up? What do oil companies say? Explained in detail
articles.description: Over the past month, there have been repeated price hikes across petrol, diesel, and CNG. Consequently, consumers are gripped by the fear that oil companies might once again raise cylinder prices on June 1st. - After petrol and diesel, will LPG and PNG prices go up? What do oil companies say? Explained in detail

articles.title: How many Tiago buyers choose electric? We asked Tata Motors MD & CEO Shailesh Chandra
articles.description: The Tiago remains one of the few mass-market cars in India where buyers are embracing all three powertrain options, be it petrol, CNG or electric, in meaningful numbers.

articles.title: Pakistan Economy Stares at Major Crisis With Petrol at PKR 380, Inflation Shoots 300%
articles.description: Citizens are struggling to cope with rising costs, as salaries remain stagnant while prices soar, exacerbated by disruptions in global energy markets linked to US-Iran tensions. , Economy, Times Now

articles.title: RBI Likely To Maintain Status Quo In June MPC Meeting, Says SBI Research
articles.description: Rising crude oil prices, rupee depreciation and fuel price hikes have increased inflation risks, but RBI is likely to rely on liquidity and currency measures instead of raising rates, according to an SBI Research report

articles.title: Firelighter 'doused in petrol' shoved into dad's Birmingham home
articles.description: Detectives are carrying out enquiries after a firefighter was pushed through the letterbox of a family home in Kingstanding

articles.title: ‘Petrol at PKR 380 per litre, inflation unbearable’: Pakistan stares at economic crisis amid US-Iran tensions
articles.description: According to Pakistan's local newspaper Dawn, the neighbouring country cut its petrol and diesel prices by PKR (Pakistan Rupee) 22 per litre on 29 May.

articles.title: Cummins Vs Kaynes: How Price Action Decodes Changing Investment Regimes
articles.description: There is a broad market consensus that Q4FY26 corporate results have not yet meaningfully factored in the impact of rising oil prices and rupee depreciation.

articles.title: Market Trading Guide: YES Bank among two stock picks for Monday with up to 10% upside scope
articles.description: Equity markets saw broad-based selling pressure after weak monsoon forecasts raised concerns over food inflation, though falling crude oil prices and easing bond yields helped limit downside risks. Investors now await key domestic triggers, including the RBI policy decision and GDP data, while analysts have flagged YES Bank and NBCC as stocks with strong short-term bullish momentum and upside potential.

articles.title: Govt revises fuel export levies for fortnight beginning June 1, domestic rates unchanged
articles.description: The notification by the Ministry of Finance stated that the entry of Rs 3 per litre shall be substituted for petrol exports, while diesel has been revised to Rs 16.5 per litre.
